Inquiry
10+ Years Sourcing in South Korea

Direct Automobile Export
From Korea to the World

We source, inspect, and ship premium passenger cars, luxury sedans, electric vehicles, and SUVs. Best wholesale rates directly from Incheon & Busan ports.

100%

Shipping Insurance

Why Hamsa Holdings

Your Trusted Korean Export Partner

We bridge the gap between South Korea's massive automotive market and global buyers with transparency, efficiency, and expert coordination.

Direct Sourcing

Access to major Korean domestic auctions, dealership networks, and manufacturer-direct fleets for the best local pricing.

150-Point Inspection

Full diagnostic checks, paint thickness reports, engine diagnostics, and detailed high-resolution video inspect before shipping.

Safe Logistics & Shipping

Complete RORO (Roll-on/Roll-off) and Container booking coordination. Secure transit documentation, customs clearances, and insurance.

10 Years local Presence

Established business with reliable Korean partners, secure local bank guarantees, and a physical office in South Korea.

Licensed and professional automobile exporter in South Korea. Exporting quality passenger and luxury cars worldwide.
